summary: Reviewed main...impl/gap-012 equivalent diff and changed files. No blocking correctness, DoD, test, or AGENTS.md Hard Rule issues found.
contract_items_verified: GAP-012 recipe now points live_check at fresh output/evidence/local-stats-bronze-regen and pipeline at its bronze/ child.
pipeline.py validates a supplied local --bronze-root exists and is a directory before Gold output writes.
pipeline.py raises on a local Bronze root that yields no stats frames and no raw news articles, preventing the documented empty-Gold trap.
Deterministic integration tests cover missing --bronze-root, empty local Bronze root, and live_check run-id nesting with tmp_path/fake collectors.

Docs/progress artifacts updated: research note, implementation plan, docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md, .planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md, docs/VERIFICATION.md, docs/GAP_REGISTER.md, docs/TASKS.md, docs/index.html.

AGENTS.md Hard Rules checked: raw Bronze landing semantics unchanged; numeric merges unchanged and deterministic; no LLM numeric rewriting; no fabricated source data in tests; runtime recipe outputs stay under output/evidence/; dashboard/TASKS sync present.
